languages.text: "Ваш полк служил Себериану? Каким он был?"
"Your regiment served Seberian? Tell me, what kind of man was he?"
languages.original_text: "Ваш полк служил Себериану? Каким он был?"

traits.locale_text: "Your regiment served Seberian? Tell me what kind of man was he?"
"Your regiment served Seberian? Tell me what kind of man was he?"
"Your regiment served Seberian? Tell me, what kind of man was he?"
"Your regiment served Seberian? Tell me, what kind of man was he?"
"Your regiment served Seberian? Tell me, what kind of man was he?"

languages.text: "Euer Regiment hat Seberian gedient? Was war er für ein Mensch?"
languages.original_text: "Your regiment served Seberian? Tell me, what kind of man was he?"

traits.locale_text: "Euer Regiment hat Seberian gedient? Was war er für ein Mensch?"

languages.text: « Votre régiment a servi sous Seberian ? Dites-moi, quel genre d'homme était-il ? »
languages.original_text: "Your regiment served Seberian? Tell me, what kind of man was he?"

traits.locale_text: « Votre régiment a servi sous Seberian ? Dites-moi, quel genre d'homme était-il ? »

languages.text: «¿Su regimiento sirvió a Seberian? Dígame, ¿qué clase de hombre era?».
languages.original_text: "Your regiment served Seberian? Tell me, what kind of man was he?"

traits.locale_text: «¿Su regimiento sirvió a Seberian? Dígame, ¿qué clase de hombre era?».

languages.text: "Alayınız, Seberian'a mı hizmet etti? Söylesene, nasıl bir adamdı?"
languages.original_text: "Your regiment served Seberian? Tell me, what kind of man was he?"

traits.locale_text: "Alayınız, Seberian'a mı hizmet etti? Söylesene, nasıl bir adamdı?"

languages.text: “你们的军团曾效忠于塞贝里安？跟我说说他是个什么样的人。”
languages.original_text: "Your regiment served Seberian? Tell me, what kind of man was he?"

traits.locale_text: “你们的军团曾效忠于塞贝里安？跟我说说他是个什么样的人。”

languages.text: 「あなたの連隊はシベリアに赴任したのですか。教えてください、彼はどんな人物でしたか？」
languages.original_text: "Your regiment served Seberian? Tell me, what kind of man was he?"

traits.locale_text: 「あなたの連隊はシベリアに赴任したのですか。教えてください、彼はどんな人物でしたか？」
